title: MyCaseValue Platform Launch
description: Initial release of MyCaseValue with 5.1M+ federal court cases across 84 NOS codes and 94 federal judicial districts. Data sourced from FJC Integrated Database through Q3 2024.

title: Q4 2024 FJC Data Refresh
description: Quarterly data update incorporating new case filings, dispositions, and settlements from the FJC Integrated Database. Win rates and settlement ranges recalculated across all NOS codes.

title: AI Attorney Tools Suite Launch
description: Released six AI-powered attorney tools: Research Memo Generator, Demand Letter Drafting, Case Predictor, Discovery Generator, Deposition Prep, and Document Intelligence.

title: EEOC & NLRB Data Integration
description: Added EEOC charge pipeline data for employment discrimination NOS codes and NLRB case activity data for labor relations pages.

title: FJC IDB Data Refresh - Q1 2026 Complete
description: Comprehensive data update from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database covering all dispositions through March 31, 2026. Updated win rates, settlement patterns, and case duration metrics across all 94 federal districts.

title: Judge Analytics Engine - Win Rate Predictors
description: New machine learning model predicts likely trial outcomes based on assigned judge and case characteristics. Analyzes judge-specific summary judgment patterns, trial win rates, and damages awards across all case types.

title: Settlement Data Filtering - Confidence Level Adjustment
description: Corrected filtering logic for settlement percentile calculations to exclude confidential settlements and improve P25, P50, P90 accuracy. Settlement figures now reflect only publicly documented outcomes.

title: Venue Optimizer Tool Launch
description: New tool helps attorneys evaluate and compare federal districts based on win rates, settlement patterns, case duration, judge assignment, and jury demographics. Includes side-by-side district comparison and outcome predictions.

title: Case Predictor Training Data Expansion
description: Expanded case outcome prediction model with 18 months of additional historical data (2024-2025) and refined outcome probability calibration. Improved accuracy for employment discrimination and civil rights cases.

title: Judge Intelligence Dashboard - Personal Patterns
description: Enhanced judge profile pages with individual judicial patterns: summary judgment grant rates, average damages awards, settlement propensities, and case duration patterns. Now covers all federal judges with 5+ years history.

title: NOS Code Classification - Subcode Granularity
description: Fixed NOS code subcategory assignments for patent and copyright cases. Improved distinction between patent infringement (2100), trademark (2400), and copyright (2500) cases. Impact on case type filtering and outcome metrics.

title: PACER Integration - Real-Time Case Tracking
description: Integrated Public Access to Court Electronic Records (PACER) data feeds for real-time case status updates across all districts. Case dispositions now updated daily with 24-hour delay from federal court filing systems.
